bio: Behnam Rezaei served as Intelligence Director of the [IRGC Navy](/orgs/irgc-navy) under the [IRGC](/orgs/islamic-revolutionary-guard-corps). He was killed on 26 March 2026 in the same Israeli airstrike at Bandar Abbas that killed [IRGC Navy Commander Alireza Tangsiri](/people/alireza-tangsiri), as part of the [March 2026 Strike Wave](/events/march-2026-strike-wave).

sources.title: IRGC Navy Leadership Killed in Bandar Abbas Strike

editorial_notes: Killed 26 March 2026. Died in same strike as Alireza Tangsiri at Bandar Abbas.
